craigslist.title: Explore Our Affordable Monthly Rates - No Lease, No Deposit Required!
craigslist.full_address: 951 N. Frontage Road, Darien Explore Our
craigslist.geocode_query: 951 N. Frontage Road, Darien Explore Our
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *This is a Monthly Price, Plus Tax No Lease, No Deposit = Hassle-Free Living! WELCOME TO THE ULTIMATE APARTMENT ALTERNATIVE! Enjoy all-inclusive pricing with the flexibility to pay weekly or monthly, and save hundreds every month! No lease, no deposit, and no credit check mean you can check in or out on your terms - completely stress-free. No Lease - Check out on your schedule On-site staff available 24/7 for emergencies Under-bed storage for extra space and organizatio Save hundreds every month! 24/7 vending machines with snacks and drinks Various Studio Layouts; Choose what's right for you! Flexible Payment Plans - Pay weekly or monthly Free Utilities - Electric, A/C & Heat No Deposit - Check-in any time Full Kitchens - Save $money$ by cooking your own meals Dog friendly - We love your fur babies! Free Bi-weekly Housekeeping - Relax and enjoy your time! Your Safety is Our Top Priority! We offer 24/7 key-controlled access and have staff on-site around the clock for your peace of mind. Pet-Friendly Accommodations: We welcome up to two dogs under 50 lbs. (pet fee applies). Experience Exceptional Value! Book your stay with us today and discover why we're the best choice in the area! Contact Us Now! Call or email to reserve your spot! Limited-Time Offer for New Guests Only! Call: (630) 228-1510 Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information. Extra charge for additional beds.
